message:
Add agent abort/resume test coverage, event transition validator, and schema-driven model defaults

Three interconnected improvements to agent session lifecycle and model configuration:

src/agent.rs — Abort/resume integration tests (~470 lines):
- PhasedProvider mock: returns StartThenPending for first N calls,
  then a Done response to simulate stalled→resumed streams
- ToolCallProvider + HangingTool: provider always emits tool call
  paired with a tool whose execute() never completes, for testing
  abort-during-tool-execution
- 3 test cases: single abort→resume verifies 4-message history;
  repeated abort verifies 6-message history with correct StopReason
  progression; abort during tool execution verifies ToolResult with
  is_error=true and "Tool execution aborted" text is persisted

src/model.rs — Event transition state machine (~175 lines):
- EventTransitionState validates AssistantMessageEvent streams have
  correct lifecycle ordering (Start before deltas, matching Start/End
  pairs, single terminal event, no open blocks at terminal)
- Produces structured JSON diagnostics on validation failure
- Tests for valid sequences, out-of-order deltas, malformed payloads

src/models.rs — Schema-driven custom model defaults:
- apply_custom_models() now inherits routing_defaults from the provider
  schema (reasoning, input types, context_window, max_tokens) instead
  of hardcoded fallbacks, so provider-specific capabilities like
  Anthropic's reasoning=true and image input propagate correctly
- Tests for cohere and anthropic schema-driven default propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
